docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-08-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-10-2011 CONTINUED TO NOV-09-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-10-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST KEN A. LAMANCE, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-08-2011, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-23-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-08-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-08-2011 CONTINUED TO AUG-10-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM AS TO DEFENDANT DEFRANK, JOEDY P SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-19-2011
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM SERVED NOV-12-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEFRANK, JOEDY P
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-09-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
